message:
fix(tmux): set history-limit 50000 on new sessions to preserve scrollback (#57)

tmux defaults to only 2000 lines of scrollback, which means output that
exceeds the visible pane height is silently lost. This is especially
problematic for palette commands and long-running agent output.

- Add DefaultHistoryLimit (50000) constant and CreateSessionWithHistoryLimit
- Set history-limit on every new session via set-option after creation
- Add configurable tmux.history_limit to TmuxConfig (TOML)
- Wire config value through spawn, create, and robot spawn paths

Closes #57

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
